chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1763 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 10.11.2017. Mr. Ali Asghar Mangi, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith SIP Muhammad Yaseen Brohi P.S Matli on behalf of S.H.O P.S Matli and ASI Muhammad Hasil P.S Shaikh Bhirkio. This petition has been filed by the petitioners seeking protection as they are apprehending harassment by their family members due to marriage on freewill. Learned A.A.G has filed the comments of respondents No.2, 4 and 5 showing that no harassment has been caused to the petitioners and it has been undertaken that as and when the petitioners would approach them, the protection in accordance with law will be provided to the petitioners, which has satisfied the learned Counsel for the petitioners who seeks disposal of this petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
